title: DragN's Livestock Overhaul: Pets Addon!
body:
**Welcome to the DragN’s Livestock Overhaul: Pets Addon!**

LO: Pets is an addon to the Livestock Overhaul base mod that revamps ‘tamable’ animals or animals often classified as pets, such as:

-Cats

-Ocelots

-Wolves/ Dogs

-Foxes

-Parrots

-Axolotls

-Tropical Fish

Animals are converted automatically by the mod, and will spawn with random variants.

Pets Overhaul revamps models, textures and changes some mechanics as well, in the same style as the original Livestock Overhaul.

Thank you to Buu for the beautiful animations!

**Discord:** https://discord.gg/2WznNTtVac

**Q:** Animations won't play or aren't playing correctly?

**A:** This is actually a Geckolib issue. Try turning off your Entity Shadows in both your game options and your shader options, especially if you're using a shader loader like Iris. You can also try turning off the Iris/ Oculus Geckolib Compat mod if you're on 1.20.1. I can't fix this issue on my end unfortunately.

Other questions? Try the Wiki, it may help! :)

https://github.com/DragN0007/Overhauled-Pets/wiki

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
